name: Richard Kiley
abstract: Richard Paul Kiley (March 31, 1922 – March 5, 1999) was an American stage, film, and television actor and singer. He is best known for his distinguished theatrical career in which he twice won the Tony Award for Best Actor in a Musical.

concerts.label: Cavalcade of Stars to Benefit the Shield Institute
Give My Regards to Broadway – A Salute to 125 Years of Musical Theater

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: I did Man of La Mancha with Richard Kiley the second time around.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
